title: ConstructionActivities
description: ConstructionActivities: A class defining the environmental impacts associated with the construction activities of a building.

EnvironmentalFactors.description: List of environmental factors associated with the construction process. The default values are indicative only and should be replaced with project specific data where available. All factors stated per unit area.

ConstructedFloorArea.description: The total gross internal area (GIA) of the constructed building. This is used to scale the environmental factors above. Property has a quantity of type Area measured in [m²].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
